    "Proposed recovery plan violates the hard concrete cure lag constraint (CC).",
    "Loading the slab before the 3-day cure period ends risks structural cracking and structural failure."

  "actions": [
    "Reject the foreman's proposal to start framing (D) early.",
    "Enforce the full 3-day concrete cure lag (CC) before allowing framing loads on the slab."
  ],
  "rationale": "The recovery plan proposes starting framing (D) one day early by loading the slab before the cure period (CC) ends. The schedule legend explicitly states that cure lags are hard constraints and cannot be compressed. Compressing this lag violates structural safety and building code requirements for concrete strength development.",

  ]
